title: Waiting for the Bus
content: Ethan stood at the bus stop on a cold evening. The bus was late again. Around him, people checked their phones or looked down the street impatiently. A woman drank coffee from a paper cup, and a man listened to music with large headphones. Ethan watched the city lights and thought about his long day at work. Finally, the bus arrived with a loud noise. Everyone entered quickly to escape the cold wind outside. Ethan found a seat near the window and relaxed during the ride home.
